examples.name: Show lldp timers output with required timers only
examples.input:
LLDP Timers:

Holdtime in seconds: 120
Reinit-time in seconds: 2
Transmit interval in seconds: 30

examples.name: Show lldp timers output with optional timer fields
examples.input:
show lldp timers

LLDP Timers:

    Holdtime in seconds: 120
    Reinit-time in seconds: 2
    Transmit interval in seconds: 30
    Transmit delay in seconds: 2
    Hold multiplier in seconds: 4
    Notification interval in seconds: 5
